title: Successful Share Extension Memo Creation for Instagram
description: Validate that sharing content from Instagram creates a new memo, correctly identifies the platform, and navigates to the memo detail screen.

steps.description: Share content from Instagram to the Auraly app.
Verify that the platform is recognized as Instagram.
Verify that a new memo is created and saved in the global state.
Verify navigation to the Memo Detail View of the newly created memo.

title: Share Extension Handling with Unsupported Platform
description: Verify that sharing content from an unsupported platform results in graceful error handling without app crash.

steps.description: Attempt to share content from an unsupported app (e.g., Facebook) to Auraly.
Verify that an appropriate error message is displayed to the user.
Verify that no memo is created in the global state.
Verify that the app remains stable and does not crash or freeze.

title: Audio Player Playback Controls Functionality
description: Check audio player functionalities including play, pause, and progress tracking during audio playback in memo detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to memo detail screen with a valid audio memo.
Press play button on the sticky audio player.
Verify audio playback starts and progress bar updates accordingly.
Press pause button.
Verify audio playback pauses and progress bar stops updating.

title: Audio Player Speed Control Cycling
description: Verify the speed control button cycles playback speed through 0.75x, 1.0x, and 1.5x correctly and updates playback speed accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to memo detail screen with audio playback.
Click speed control button once.
Verify playback speed is set to 0.75x.
Click speed control button again.
Verify playback speed is set to 1.0x.
Click speed control button a third time.
Verify playback speed is set to 1.5x.
Click speed control button a fourth time.
Verify playback speed cycles back to 0.75x.

title: Home Screen Memo List Displays and Filters
description: Validate that the home screen lists memos properly, displays platform icons, and filters memos based on selected platform.

steps.description: Launch the app and navigate to home screen.
Verify that the memo list displays all recent memos.
Verify that each memo displays the correct platform icon (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok).
Use platform filter to select only Instagram memos.
Verify that only memos shared from Instagram are displayed.
Clear filter and select TikTok memos.
Verify that only memos shared from TikTok are displayed.

title: Memo Detail Tabs Display and Content Verification
description: Verify each memo detail tab (summary, transcript, vocabulary, grammar, conjugations) loads correctly and displays the correct data.

steps.description: Open a memo detail screen with full content.
Navigate to Summary tab.
Verify summary text is displayed and accurate.
Navigate to Transcript tab.
Verify transcript content is correctly rendered.
Navigate to Vocabulary tab.
Verify vocabulary list is displayed with correct entries.
Navigate to Grammar tab.
Verify grammar cards are correctly displayed with proper formatting.
Navigate to Conjugations tab.
Verify conjugations data is accurate and visible.

title: Import Flow Language Selection After Sharing
description: Validate the import language selection sheet appears after content sharing and properly records user language choice.

steps.description: Share content from a supported platform into Auraly.
Verify the import language selection UI sheet is displayed.
Select a language from the list.
Verify the selected language is saved and associated with the new memo.
Verify navigation proceeds to the memo detail screen after language selection.

title: Flashcards Swipe and Flip Animations
description: Verify that flashcards can be swiped left and right and flipped, and animations perform smoothly without glitches.

steps.description: Navigate to flashcards screen starting from a memo detail.
Swipe flashcard to the left.
Verify next flashcard is displayed with smooth swipe animation.
Swipe flashcard to the right.
Verify previous flashcard is displayed with smooth swipe animation.
Tap flashcard to flip it.
Verify card flips to show other side with smooth animation.

title: Quiz Feature Completion and Scoring
description: Validate quiz participation flow from answering questions to receiving a final score and confetti animation on completion.

steps.description: Start a quiz from a memo.
Answer all quiz questions.
Verify that score is calculated correctly based on answers.
Verify confetti animation is shown upon quiz completion.
Verify option to retake or exit quiz is presented.

title: Onboarding Flow Persistence Across Restarts
description: Verify that onboarding completion status persists after app restarts and onboarding screens are not shown again.

steps.description: Install app fresh and complete onboarding flow.
Verify onboarding is marked completed in persistent storage.
Close and restart the app.
Verify app lands directly on home screen without onboarding screens.

title: UI Responsiveness and Smooth Scrolling
description: Test UI performance by verifying scrolling in memo lists and animations maintain 60fps and no visible lag.

steps.description: Navigate to home screen with a large list of memos.
Scroll rapidly up and down through memo list.
Verify scrolling is smooth with no dropped frames or jank.
Navigate to flashcards and quiz animations.
Verify swipe, flip, and confetti animations perform smoothly without stutter.

title: Graceful Handling of Network Outages During Memo Fetch
description: Verify app behavior when network outages occur during memo data fetching and playback.

steps.description: Simulate network outage while opening app and fetching memo data.
Verify app displays network error message and option to retry.
Retry fetching after restoring network.
Verify memos load correctly and audio playback is functional.

title: Performance Metrics for Launch Time and Memory Usage
description: Measure and verify that app launch time is under 3 seconds and memory usage stays below 150MB on supported devices.

steps.description: Close app completely.
Launch the app on a typical supported device.
Measure and verify app fully loads home screen in less than 3 seconds.
Monitor memory usage during launch and verify it remains below 150MB.
